Container.Name: AgenticSeek-SearxNG
Container.Overview: SearxNG search engine used by AgenticSeek for private, local web searches. This is a required companion container for the AgenticSeek-Backend. SearxNG is a free internet metasearch engine that aggregates results from various sources while not tracking users.
Container.Requires: AgenticSeek-Redis must be running before starting this container. Start containers in this order: 1) AgenticSeek-Redis, 2) AgenticSeek-SearxNG, 3) AgenticSeek-Backend, 4) AgenticSeek-Frontend.

Config.Name: SearxNG Port
Config.Description: Port for the SearxNG web interface. The AgenticSeek backend connects to this port for web searches.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Path to the SearxNG configuration directory. On first run, SearxNG will create default config files here including settings.yml and limiter.toml.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Public base URL of this SearxNG instance. Used for generating result links. If accessing from outside your network, replace localhost with your server's IP or hostname.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Required secret key for SearxNG session security. You MUST set this before starting the container — leave it empty and SearxNG will refuse to start. Generate a key by running: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: uWSGI Workers
Config.Description: Number of uWSGI worker processes. Reduce to 2 on low-memory systems.

Config.Name: uWSGI Threads
Config.Description: Number of threads per uWSGI worker.
